phrases.intent_en: Where is the cathedral ticket booth?
phrases.cultural_note: The ticket office is often tucked away under the terrace rather than at the main facade.

likely_response.local: Doleva pod terasou, u bočního vchodu.
likely_response.translation_en: To the left under the terrace, by the side entrance.

responses.english: To the left under the terrace, by the side entrance.
responses.french: Doleva pod terasou, u bočního vchodu.

phrases.cultural_note: The column stands directly in the street's pedestrian area, making it a natural landmark for directions.

likely_response.translation_en: Straight ahead a bit, in the middle of the street.

responses.english: Straight ahead a bit, in the middle of the street.

phrases.cultural_note: The best panoramic view is from the elevated terrace behind St. Barbara's Cathedral.

likely_response.local: Za katedrálou, po schodech nahoru na terasu.
likely_response.translation_en: Behind the cathedral, up the stairs to the terrace.

responses.english: Behind the cathedral, up the stairs to the terrace.
responses.french: Za katedrálou, po schodech nahoru na terasu.

phrases.text_local: Kde je sraz na komentovanou prohlídku?
phrases.cultural_note: Guides commonly use the prominent Plague Column as a visible and central meeting point on the street.

likely_response.local: U morového sloupu, průvodce tam bude čekat.
likely_response.translation_en: At the Plague Column, the guide will wait there.

responses.english: At the Plague Column, the guide will wait there.
responses.french: U morového sloupu, průvodce tam bude čekat.
